headline: Trump DUMPS MLK/Juneteenth 🎉🚫 for BIRTHDAY 🎂🇺🇸 FREE PARK ORGY 🏞️🍑
text:
Trump 🍊👑 ADMIN dropping BOMBS 💣🏞️ on NPS 🏔️📜 – YANKING MLK DAY ✊🏿🚫 and JUNETEENTH 🪢💥 from FREE ENTRY DAYS 😤💸 cuz AMERICA FIRST 🦅🔥! Slapping in FLAG DAY 🎌😍 – aka DONALD'S BDAY 🎉🍰 – as PATRIOTIC 🎇 FREE-FIESTA 🥳🏕️ starting 2026 🚀! Foreign tourists 👀🌍? PAY UP SUCKERS 💰😩 – NO FREE RIDE on 'MERICA'S BACK 🐎🇺🇸, jacking annual pass from $80 to THICC $250 💦📈 while Yanks keep $80 EASY PEASY 🍔🤑!

New FREE DAYS for REAL AMERICANS 🇺🇸❤️: President's Day 🕴️, Memorial Day ⚰️🎖️, FLAG/BDAY 🎂🦅, INDEPENDENCE WEEKEND 💥🇺🇸, NPS 110th BDAY 🎈🏞️, Constitution Day 📜🔥, Teddy Roosevelt BDAY 🐻👨‍💼, Veteran's Day 🪖🙌! Biden's DEI WOKETARDS 🤡🌈 added MLK/Juneteenth but Trump said 'NAH FAM ❌' – EXEC ORDER 🚫DEI on DAY 1 💥, axing those 'CELEBRATIONS' 😏 while keeping 'em holidays... but NO PARK PARTIES 🥂🚫!

Interior Sec DOUG BURGUM 💪📢 spilling TEA ☕: 'TRUMP PUTS AMERICAN FAMILIES FIRST 👨‍👩‍👧‍👦🇺🇸 – TAXPAYERS GET AFFORDABLE ACCESS 🤑🏞️, FOREIGNERS PAY FAIR SHARE 💸🌍 to FUND OUR ICONIC SPOTS 🔥!' Budget? $90M+ EXTRA CHA-CHING 💰📊 from tourist surcharges – at TOP 11 parks, NO PASS = $100 HEAD TAX 😤💵 + entrance! Non-US peeps STILL PAY on FREE DAYS 😂🔒 – 'MERICA BALLS DEEP 🏈🍆!

Not Trump’s FIRST RODEO 🤠 – June MILITARY PARADE 💥🚀 in DC for ARMY 250th 🪖🎂 smacked on FLAG DAY/BDAY vibes 🇺🇸! BBC simping for comment 📞🤡 but White House like 'HOLD MY BIG MAC 🍔😎'! Woke snowflakes ❄️😭 MELTING over 'RACIST' swap but Trump like 'FLAGS OVER FETTERS 🪢🎌 – PATRIOTISM POPS OFF 📈🇺🇸!' Foreign cucks 🌍😢 funding OUR TRAILS 🥾 while Yanks HIKE FREE on DON'S SPECIAL DAY 🎂🏞️🚀 – MAGA PARK ORGY INCOMING 💦👯‍♂️‼️
